hero.title: Hlawhtlin theihna
hero.lead: IATF chuan he website hi a awlsam a, a chhiar theih a, keyboard hmanga hman theih a ni a, ṭanpuitu technology-te nêna inmil a ni tih a tum a ni.
support: Web accessibility-ah chuan IATF chuan [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/) Accessibility hi hman tangkai tak a nih theih nan a hmangtu ten direct experience an neih a ngai bawk a ni.

paragraphs: He website-a in luh theih lohna in hmuh chuan e-mail hmangin lo hrilh rawh u:
items: A pawimawh a nih chuan, eng ṭanpuitu technology, browser, emaw hmanrua nge i hman?
report.footnote: Bug report ziah kher a ngai lo a. Thuziak fiah tak ziah mai chu a tâwk a ni.

paragraphs: Accessibility issue-te chu a huam chhunga siamthat theih turin public repository-ah summarized a ni thei a. Personal contact details leh private information ngai lo te chu tihchhuah hmaa paih a ni.
I report-ah hian private information a tel a nih chuan, thuchah-ah chiang takin sawi rawh.
He site hi a tlêm hle a, a tam zâwk chu a awm reng a ni. Ṭhenkhat ṭawng version chu lehlin a nih lai hian a kim lo mai thei a.
